summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Fixify AI-driven community problem reporting platform. All backend APIs working perfectly (10/10 tests passed). Frontend core functionality working well with minor UI overlay issue on chatbot button.

ui_bugs.issue: Chatbot button unclickable due to Emergent badge overlay interference
ui_bugs.workaround: Chatbot functionality works, just button clicking blocked by overlay

passed_tests: Homepage loads with 'See it. Say it. Report it.' slogan
Dashboard loads with map, stats, filters, and charts
Report Issue form validation and step-by-step flow
Fixi chatbot widget appears for logged-in users
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix Fixi chatbot button overlay issue - Emergent badge is blocking click events on the chatbot button
